Prolonged use of the inhaler may cause wear and tear of some parts, contamination with bacteria or contamination with injected drugs. This cannot be prevented even with very careful maintenance, hygiene and disinfection. The ideal solution is to completely replace the most susceptible parts at least once a year. The OMRON inhalation set contains everything you need in one package - mask for children and adults, inhalation hoses, mouthpieces, medication containers and sealing ring.
